channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Filipino Hotel Brand Hotel101 Launches Its First Overseas Property in Madrid
item.description: On March 10, 2026, the Philippines marked a historic milestone as Hotel101, a major Filipino hospitality brand, officially opened its first international property in Madrid, Spain. This project is led...

item.title: Northern Territory communities face repeated flooding as residents evacuated
item.description: Severe flooding has forced hundreds of residents from remote Northern Territory communities, including Nauiyu/Daly River, Palumpa, Beswick, and Jilkminggan, to evacuate to Darwin. Phillip Morgan, who ...

item.title: Health Facilities Must Serve Patients Even During SHA System Downtime, Says CS Duale
item.description: Health Cabinet Secretary Aden Duale has strongly instructed all health facilities under the Social Health Authority (SHA) scheme to continue offering medical services even when the system experiences ...

item.title: Hindustan Petroleum Takes Measures to Ensure LPG Supply Amid US-Iran Tensions
item.description: Hindustan Petroleum (HPCL) has assured that steps are being taken to secure the availability of cooking gas for households and key public services amid disruptions in global fuel supply caused by the ...

item.title: Democrats Plan Bill to Ban Prediction Market Contracts on War and Death Events
item.description: Democratic lawmakers are preparing to introduce legislation aimed at explicitly prohibiting event contracts in prediction markets that are linked to war, death, terrorism, assassination, or other sens...

item.title: Five minors injured as suspected terrorist quadcopter drops explosives in Lakki Marwat
item.description: Five children sustained injuries in an attack believed to have been carried out through a quadcopter in Lakki Marwat district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa on Tuesday. According to Police Sub-Inspector Akhto ...

item.title: Government Backs New Cardiac Unit at KCMC to Improve Heart Care
item.description: MOSHI: The Tanzanian government is fully supporting the construction of a Cardiac Treatment Unit at Kilimanjaro Christian Medical Centre (KCMC), aiming to reduce the need for patients to travel abroad...

item.title: Gauteng tables R179.2bn budget for 2026/27, prioritising health, education and infrastructure amid fiscal pressures
item.description: Gauteng Economic Development MEC Lebohang Maile has tabled the province's medium-term budget, amounting to R179.2 billion for the 2026/27 financial year. This forms part of a larger R549.3 billion all...

item.title: US Medical Glove Company to Invest in PH, Creating 2,000 Local Jobs
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. announced that the US Medical Glove Company plans to establish a medical glove manufacturing facility in the Philippines, which is expected to generate around 2,000 jobs...

item.title: Saskay criticizes Matawalle for political celebration amid soldiers’ sacrifices
item.description: Reality TV star and ex-Big Brother Naija housemate, Saskay, don call out Minister of State for Defence, Bello Matawalle, after Matawalle celebrate Zamfara State Governor, Dauda Lawal, joining the All ...

item.title: West Indies players return home on commercial flights after ICC charter delays
item.description: West Indies cricket team players have started returning from India on commercial flights after their chartered plane was cancelled due to international airspace closures amid ongoing tensions in the M...

item.title: The impact of Glasgow’s historic building fires on community identity and belonging
item.description: The recent fire at Glasgow’s Union Corner building, adjacent to Central Station, has stirred strong emotions among Glaswegians, recalling previous tragedies like the fires at the Glasgow School of Art...

item.title: Johannesburg investigates 16 cases of fraudulent municipal land transfers
item.description: The Johannesburg Property Company (JPC) has launched 16 fraud cases with the police following the discovery that several city-owned properties were transferred to private individuals and companies wit...

item.title: Rappler Daily Wrap: Oil Surge Due to Gulf Conflict, Meralco Rate Hike, Ressa Acquittal Recommendation, Herbosa Graft Complaint, and Russian Cyber Campaign
item.description: On March 10, 2026, Rappler's daily news wrap highlighted several major developments. Globally, oil prices surged to their highest levels since 2022 amid escalating conflict in the Middle East involvin...

item.title: Wife Of Missing NELAN Engineer Accuses Cover-Up Linked To Former Ebonyi Governor Umahi In 2021 Disappearance Case
item.description: This matter dey about the mysterious disappearance of five engineers wey dey work for Nelan Consultants since November 2021. Dem travel go Abakaliki, Ebonyi State, to supervise the Abakaliki Ring Road...

item.title: First Impressions of Apple’s Affordable MacBook Neo
item.description: Trevor Long provides a first look at Apple's newly launched MacBook Neo, a more affordable addition to the MacBook lineup. The review highlights the laptop's design, performance, and overall usability...

item.title: Inmate charged with murder of Soham killer Ian Huntley following prison attack
item.description: A 43-year-old prisoner named Anthony Russell, currently incarcerated at HMP Frankland in County Durham, has been charged with the murder of Ian Huntley. Huntley, aged 52 and serving life imprisonment ...

item.title: Calls for Australia to ensure the safety of Iranian women's football team during Asian Cup stay
item.description: The Iranian women's football team faced international attention and safety concerns after refusing to sing their national anthem ahead of their match against South Korea in the Women's Asian Cup. This...

item.title: High Court directs immediate return of R82 million to uThukela Municipality amid legal dispute
item.description: The Pietermaritzburg High Court has issued an urgent order for the immediate return of R82 million to the uThukela District Municipality, which had been withdrawn from its accounts by service provider...

item.title: Toronto police investigate firearm discharge at U.S. Consulate amid recent local attacks
item.description: Toronto police are investigating an incident in which shots were fired at the U.S. Consulate in downtown Toronto early Tuesday morning, near University Avenue and Queen Street West. Authorities confir...
